link.title: UnixBSDShell

"review": { "@type": "Review",
"author": { "@type": "Person", "name": "Iwan Setiawan", "givenName": "Bata", "familyName": "Iwan Setiawan", "email": "iwanse1212@yandex.com", "url": "https://www.blogger.com/profile/08958087252392329520", "gender": "male", "description": "Linux and BSD are operating systems for various platforms that focus on features, speed, and stability. These systems are derived from UNIX versions", "alternateName": "Iwan Sting", "additionalName": "Setiawan", "birthDate": "1977", "birthPlace": "Kabupaten Bekasi, Provinsi Jawa Barat, Indonesia", "jobTitle": "Blogger Writer", "spouse": "Siti Umaroh", "award": "Navigasi Darat", "seeks": "Fame" },
